introSection: Cruiser Coaster is a steel kiddie spinning roller coaster located at Craig's Cruisers Family Fun Center in Wyoming, Michigan, USA. The roller coaster opened on February 2, 2018.
fullText:
Cruiser Coaster is a steel kiddie spinning roller coaster located at Craig's Cruisers Family Fun Center in Wyoming, Michigan, USA. The roller coaster opened on February 2, 2018.



Each row sits back-to-back.
